content:
I need to multiply 929 × 312 in base 11.

First, let me convert to base 10, calculate, then convert back to base 11.

929 (base 11) = 9×11² + 2×11¹ + 9×11⁰ = 9×121 + 2×11 + 9 = 1089 + 22 + 9 = 1120 (base 10)

312 (base 11) = 3×11² + 1×11¹ + 2×11⁰ = 3×121 + 1×11 + 2 = 363 + 11 + 2 = 376 (base 10)

1120 × 376 = 421,120 (base 10)

Now convert 421,120 to base 11:
421,120 ÷ 11 = 38,283 remainder 7
38,283 ÷ 11 = 3,480 remainder 3
3,480 ÷ 11 = 316 remainder 4
316 ÷ 11 = 28 remainder 8
28 ÷ 11 = 2 remainder 6
2 ÷ 11 = 0 remainder 2

Reading the remainders from bottom to top: 268437

268437
